title: vicia repens
intro: Vicia repens, also known as creeping vetch or spring vetch, is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the pea family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Vicia repens include its ability to reduce stress, improve sleep, and support immune function, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Vicia repens is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in capsule or powder form to harness its medicinal benefits.
